claims: Use 401 Unauthorized when token is missing or invalid
Use 403 Forbidden when caller is authenticated but lacks permission
Return WWW-Authenticate headers with 401 responses when auth scheme requires credential retry
Document authentication failure vs authorization failure in operator-facing guidance

cross_source_notes.consistency: Both sources are consistent: src-02 reinforces the 401-for-token-failure rule established in src-01.
cross_source_notes.coverage_gaps: No guidance on refresh tokens, token revocation, or multi-factor auth flows.
